name: Credit Linked Capital Subsidy Scheme (CLCSS) for Technology Upgradation
administered_by: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (Development Commissioner, MSME)
retrieval_text: Upfront 15% capital subsidy, capped at Rs 15 lakh, for micro and small enterprises, including khadi, village, and coir industry units, that take a bank term loan to induct approved, well-established, improved technology in specified product and sub-sector lines. The subsidy is credited through the primary lending institution that sanctioned the term loan, on completion of technology upgradation. This scheme provides a capital subsidy, not a direct loan; the underlying term loan's own interest rate is set by the lending bank and is out of scope of this subsidy record.
documents_required: Term Loan Sanction Letter for Technology Upgradation from Primary Lending Institution
Detailed Project Report for Technology Upgradation
Latest Audited Financial Statements (Balance Sheet, Profit & Loss Account)
Final Invoices and Proof of Installation/Commissioning of New Technology/Machinery
Bank Account Statements of the MSME unit
Undertaking/Declaration by the MSME unit regarding scheme compliance
